characters.name: Bo
characters.description: Name Bo Age Bo is guilty, ugly, and stinky, getting most ofYaya's attention because of him still being a baby, and the others do keep tabs on him. He does not knows  how to talk, so he just does not talk to others in his own words.

characters.name: Graziella
characters.description: Graziellais a pink bird or platypus like monster character (as she has a beak and arms like a platypus) inWimzie's House. She wasWimzieandBo's mom,Yaya's daughter, andRousso's wife. She worked as an airline pilot until she had a plane crash incident. That is, when the kids reached kindergarten. She (Graziella) was flying flight 5432 to dc and was injured that night when it crashed into the river. And at the hospital, the doctor said that Graziella had a few years left to live (about one, two, or three decades). Afterwards, she remained alive until the kids (Wimzie,Horace,Jonas, andLoulou) were adults. (Despite recovering from her injury --after her plane crash incident-- she retired her flight job.) The day care was the show setting's first cut-off date.Wimzie,Horace,Jonas, andLouloucontinued the day care untilWimzie,Horace, andJonaswere in kindergarten. The day care, it closed by the time the three initial kids (Wimzie,Horace, andJonas) reached first grade. (ForLoulou, she was homeschooled by her parents until her year of kindergarten. And she went to real school beginning with first grade.) Afterwards, the kids remained students until they were adults. After starting their own jobs and had children of their home, both the original kids and their own families (including their own children) remained alive until they died of old age. (Graziella died when all the kids were adults. The kids remained alive --in their adulthood-- until they also died of old age along with their own family members.) The day care center (at Wimzie's house) was then abandoned and is able to be visited somewhere. (That is, after the kids and their own children also all died of old age.) The funeral service forRousso(for his death of a heart attack) was in 2002, while the one for Graziella was as early as the mid 2000's or around the 2010's.

characters.name: Loulou
characters.description: Name Loulou Age Loulou is not hyperactive,  bored most of the time  crap and mean; but despite this, she is not of a show-off. She  do not really wants to be like the older kids, but she's ready. Loulou is also able to understandBo's language. she also manages to begin crying and weeping whenever she gets upset and terrified about all sorts of negative things. like when Jonas got angry, upset and irritated due to being tired and grouchy and having a difficult day and he hit her in her arm in the episode:Jonas and All of His Hits.

characters.name: Rousso
characters.description: Roussois one of the main characters inWimzie's House. He isWimzieandBo's father andGraziella's husband. He worked as a firefighter until he died of a heart attack in 2002. His wife --after having been recovered from an injury (which was from a plane crash after crashing into another plane and landing into a river)-- remained alive until the kids (Wimzie,Bo,Loulou,Jonas, andHorace) were adults. The day care center (at Wimzie's house) was the first cut-off date. It was closed (and eventually abandoned) and is able to be visited somewhere. (That is, after the kids and their own children also all died of old age. And by extension, by the time all the monster characters died.)

characters.name: Wimzie
characters.description: Name Wimzie Age Wimzie is a kind, polite person, though she can be a bit selfish sometimes. She is not very good in control of herself and doesn't look before she leaps sometimes. Regardless, she is a good kid at heart and loves to play with her friends.
characters.personality_section: Wimzie is a kind, polite person, though she can be a bit selfish sometimes. She is not very good in control of herself and doesn't look before she leaps sometimes. Regardless, she is a good kid at heart and loves to play with her friends.
